findings.summary: copper_layers_used=0 for KiCad 5 PCB that has 4 copper layers
findings.details: The HPX board defines layers in KiCad 5 unquoted format. The analyzer reports copper_layers_used=0 and copper_layer_names=[] because its layer-parsing regex expects quoted names used in KiCad 6+ format.

findings.summary: front_side and back_side footprint counts both reported as 0 for KiCad 5 PCB
findings.details: Both mppt-2420-hpx and mppt-2420-lc report front_side=0 and back_side=0 despite HPX having 184 front-side and 7 back-side components.

findings.summary: False SPI bus detection: USART3_TX/USART3_RX on J7 (UEXT connector) misidentified as SPI
findings.details: bus_analysis reports a second SPI bus (bus_id: 'pin_J7') with SCK=USART3_TX and MOSI=USART3_RX. J7 is a UEXT multiplex connector - USART3 is the UART portion.

findings.summary: Current sense circuit correctly identified: R6 (2 mOhm shunt) with INA303A1 sense IC
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identifies the INA303A1 (U3) current-sense amplifier monitoring R6 (2 mOhm) across the DCDC_LV+/SHUNT+ differential pair.
